zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Berney於1336年出生在英國諾福爾可迪德林頓時，他的父親John de Berney42歲，母親Catherine de Bedingfield38歲。他和Margaret de Reedham至少有1個兒子。他去世於1389年11月在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利德哈姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Berney于1336年出生在英国諾福爾可迪德林頓时，他的父亲John de Berney42岁，母亲Catherine de Bedingfield38岁。他和Margaret de Reedham至少有1个儿子。他去世于1389年11月在英国英格兰諾福爾可利德哈姆享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可利德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Berney was born in 1336, in Didlington, Norfolk, England, his father, John de Berney, was 42 and his mother, Catherine de Bedingfield, was 38. He had at least 1 son with Margaret de Reedham. He died in November 1389, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Berney est né en 1336, à Didlington, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John de Berney, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Bedingfield, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret de Reedham. Il est décédé en novembre 1389, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Berney 1336 in Didlington, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Berney 42 und seine Mutter Catherine de Bedingfield 38. Er hatte mit Margaret de Reedham mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im November 1389 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Berney è nato il nel 1336 nel Didlington, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John de Berney, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Bedingfield, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret de Reedham. Morì nel novembre 1389, nel Reedham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Reedham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Berneyが1336年にイギリスノーフォルクディドリントンで生まれた時，父John de Berneyは42歳，母Catherine de Bedingfieldは38歳であった。彼はMargaret de Reedhamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1389年11月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Berney(이)가 1336년 영국 노르폴크 디들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Berney(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Bedingfield(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Margaret de Reedham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1389년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리드함에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Berney nasceu em 1336, em Didlington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Berney, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Bedingfield, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret de Reedham. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1389, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Berney родился в 1336 г. в местности дидлингтон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Berney было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Bedingfield, 38. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret de Reedham. Он умер ноябрь 1389 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Berney nació en 1336, en Didlington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Berney, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Catherine de Bedingfield, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margaret de Reedham. Murió en noviembre de 1389, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
